Symmetric tile heatmap of code co-occurrence

Source: R/visualize.R
qc_plot_cooccurrence.Rd

Displays how frequently pairs of codes appear together within the same unit (document or overlapping segment). The heatmap is symmetric – each pair appears once in each triangle.

Usage

qc_plot_cooccurrence(
  project,
  code_ids = NULL,
  unit = c("document", "segment"),
  dark = FALSE,
  ...
)

Arguments

project

A qc_project object.

code_ids

Integer vector or NULL. Restrict to these codes.

unit

One of "document" (default) or "segment".

dark

Logical. Apply dark-mode plot colours.

...

Unused. Reserved for future arguments.

Value

A ggplot2 object, or NULL (with a warning) when no co-occurrences are found.
